chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 255 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1206/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
